title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
